description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of Delicias brand chocolate cake mix, designed for baking a chocolate-flavored cake. The front face features a large, appetizing image of a layered chocolate cake with cream and nut topping, along with bold branding and flavor indication. The sides of the box display nutritional information, quality claims, and ingredient lists in Spanish, with clear, legible text and simple iconography. The back of the box provides step-by-step preparation instructions, a list of ingredients, and a photo of a chef endorsing the product. The packaging uses a dark purple and beige color scheme, with orange highlights for flavor and promotional elements. The box is sealed and appears sturdy, suitable for placement on store shelves or in a pantry.
description: A Delicias chocolate cake mix in a rectangular cardboard box, featuring a photo of a chocolate cake and detailed product information in Spanish. The packaging is dark purple and beige with orange highlights and clear branding.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Delicias branding, a large image of a chocolate cake, and clear flavor indication with orange highlights.
description_view_1: The left side displays nutritional information, a 'Mejor Calidad' (Best Quality) badge, and additional product details in a vertical layout.
description_view_2: The back view features preparation instructions, a list of ingredients, and a photo of a chef, all set against a beige background.
description_view_3: The right side highlights the 'Fácil de Hacer' (Easy to Make) claim, ingredient details, and wheat derivative information.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'Delicias' brand logo is prominently displayed on the front, top, and back of the box in a white, cursive font against a dark purple background.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the box features an orange banner with the text 'Sabor Chocolate' and an image of a chocolate cake, clearly indicating chocolate flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information is visible on the left side of the box, including a detailed nutrition facts panel and ingredient list.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A photo of a chef endorsing the product is present on the back, along with a 'Fácil de Hacer' (Easy to Make) badge on the right side.
